faq.q: How many GCC centers does Anritsu operate in India?
faq.a: Anritsu operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Anritsu have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Anritsu's India GCC presence is in Bengaluru.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Anritsu run in India?
faq.a: Anritsu runs CoE centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Anritsu's India GCCs?
faq.a: Anritsu's India centers employ in the 101 to 200 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Anritsu's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 3 leaders at Anritsu's India centers, across IT and HR. Names and contact details open with a free account.
